zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Lyons於1242年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾瓦可沃斯時，他的父親Roger de Lyons17歲，母親Joan Napton21歲。他於大約1274年與Emma Tew在英國奧可福爾鄧斯 圖結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他於1284年住在英國奧可福爾鄧斯 圖。他去世於1288年之後在英國諾薩普頓史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Lyons于1242年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾瓦可沃斯时，他的父亲Roger de Lyons17岁，母亲Joan Napton21岁。他于大约1274年与Emma Tew在英国奧可福爾鄧斯 圖结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他于1284年住在英国奧可福爾鄧斯 圖。他去世于1288年之后在英国諾薩普頓史爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lyons
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: adopted for Ó Laighin (see Lyne , Lane , Lyon ) or Ó Liatháin (see Lehane ).

variants.name: Lyon
meanings: Scottish, English, and French: from the personal name Middle English Lyon, Old French Leon (from Latin leo ‘lion’, or the cognate Greek leōn; see Leon ). Compare Lyall .
Scottish and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lyons-la-Forêt in Eure, Normandy. It is unlikely to be from the better-known southern French city of Lyon (see 5 below).

English and French: nickname from Middle English lioun ‘lion’ (Old English, Latin leo), Old French leon, perhaps applied to a brave, fierce, or proud person, or one with a shaggy mane of hair. Compare Lion .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Lyons was born in 1242, in Warkworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger de Lyons, was 17 and his mother, Joan Napton, was 21. He married Emma Tew about 1274, in Duns Tew, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He lived in Duns Tew, Oxfordshire, England in 1284. He died after 1288, in Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Lyons est né en 1242, à Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Lyons, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Joan Napton, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Emma Tew environ 1274, à Duns Tew, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il a vécu à Duns Tew, Oxfordshire, Angleterre en 1284. Il est décédé après 1288, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Lyons 1242 in Warkworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Lyons 17 und seine Mutter Joan Napton 21. Er hat um 1274 in Duns Tew, Oxfordshire, England Emma Tew geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. 1284 hat er in Duns Tew, Oxfordshire, England gelebt. Er starb nach 1288 in Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Lyons è nato il nel 1242 nel Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger de Lyons, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Joan Napton, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Emma Tew circa 1274, nel Duns Tew, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Vissuto a Duns Tew, Oxfordshire, England nel 1284. Morì dopo il 1288, nel Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Lyonsが1242年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアワークウオルスで生まれた時，父Roger de Lyonsは17歳，母Joan Naptonは21歳であった。約1274年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアダンス テウでEmma Tewと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1284年にはイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアダンス テウに住んでいた。彼は1288年以後にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Lyons(이)가 1242년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 워k워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Lyons(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Napton(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1274년 영국 스퍼드실르 던스 튜에서 Emma Tew(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 1284년도에 영국 스퍼드실르 던스 튜에서 살았다. 그는 1288년 이후 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Lyons nasceu em 1242, em Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger de Lyons, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Joan Napton, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma Tew aproximadamente 1274, em Duns Tew, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele viveu em Duns Tew, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra em 1284. Ele faleceu após 1288, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Lyons родился в 1242 г. в местности варкворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger de Lyons было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Napton, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma Tew около 1274 г. в местности дунс тю, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он жил в местности дунс тю, оксфордшир, Англия в 1284 году. Он умер после 1288 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Lyons nació en 1242, en Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger de Lyons, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Joan Napton, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Emma Tew aproximadamente 1274, en Duns Tew, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Vivió en Duns Tew, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra en 1284. Murió después de 1288, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
